'''Rondai-2''' was a cosmopolitan planet of mild weather and mild landscapes, with rolling hills but no mountains. It was two days travel by [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] from [[Haven (planetoid)|Haven]] and less than a day from [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. It was a planet for top-security, low-profile business meetings in the [[Ulta Center]].

{{Planet-stub}}
